basic_details.job_title: NCLT – Staff Car Driver, UDC and More – 106 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Govt. of India
basic_details.post_name: Joint Registrar, Deputy Registrar, Assistant Registrar, Programmer, Court Officer, Private Secretary, Senior Legal Assistant, Assistant, Stenographer Grade-I/Personal Assistant, Cashier, Record Assistant, Upper Division Clerk, Staff Car Driver
basic_details.application_mode: Offline only - through proper channel (via Employer/Head of Office/Forwarding Authority)
basic_details.short_information: The NCLT Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for a total of 106 Staff Car Driver, UDC and More vacancies. The Offline application process will begin on 21 May 2026, and the last date to submit the application form is 20 July 2026.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 60 days from the date of publication in Employment News / Rozgar Samachar

age_limit.age_details: Closing date of receipt of applications (must be below 56 years)

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications and documents; assessment by Selection Committee
Scrutiny of bio-data, service record, APAR/ACR ratings, qualifications, experience and suitability for the post
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply offline only using Prescribed Application Proforma (Annexure-II). Applications must be submitted through proper channel only - via the Employer/Head of Office/Forwarding Authority. Applications sent directly by the candidate without being forwarded through proper channel will not be considered. Incomplete applications or those not accompanied by required documents will not be considered.
seo_tags: NCLT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 106 Staff Car Driver, UDC and More Posts
